storyboard.content: I have chest tightness and shortness of breath that has been going on for two days and is getting worse
I cannot lie flat to sleep because my breathing gets much worse, and I keep waking up gasping for air
Both my ankles are significantly swollen
I have gained about 5 pounds in the past week without eating any differently
Symptoms started two days ago and have been steadily worsening
I cannot breathe well enough to lie down and the swelling is significant
Lying down or trying to sleep makes the shortness of breath much worse
I am a 68-year-old man with a history of heart failure and I take water pills
